candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Malformed combined header; not the clean current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.

candidates.why: Clean current debt line; under IFRS this typically captures short-term interest-bearing debt and excludes operating payables. Preferred as a total current debt line.
Current portion of long-term debt; relevant STD component when no single clean total exists.

variables.notes: Excluded lease-related rows per instruction. Included the clean short-term interest-bearing debt line plus current maturities of long-term debt as the minimal non-lease financing current debt set.

candidates.why: Direct semantic match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities, but the same exact label appears twice with different values, creating ambiguity.

variables.notes: R:nc. Best semantic match, but manual review is needed because the balance sheet contains duplicate rows with the exact same label and different values.

candidates.why: Best available total/net PPE-style balance sheet line; preferable to component gross/accumulated rows.
Only a component of PPE and gross rather than total/net.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the clean total tangible asset/PPE line and better matches total/net PPE than component rows.
Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the malformed label, the values correspond to net cash flow from operating activities, i.e., the operating section total.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Used the cash flow statement operating cash flow total; the label appears concatenated with the next section header but clearly represents net cash from operating activities.
